text: 📝 Главное от Рыбаря 📝 дайджест материалов за 27 апреля События в Мали за эти несколько дней обернулись трагично для текущего правительства и позиций Африканского корпуса: Кидаль все-таки оставили , а пересуды о будущем малийского руководства разгорелись с новой силой. ❗️ Подробнее об этих и других темах читайте в нашем дайджесте. ➡️ Рыбарь @rybar — говорим о сложном просто. Основной ресурс нашего аналитического центра. Самые важные и интересные материалы. ▪️ Хроника СВО , предотвращение очередного теракта , освобождение Таратутино , флаги в Озерном ▪️ О новых правилах социальной поддержки иностранцев в России ▪️ Почему американцы открывают для себя православие ▪️ Как в ВУЗе студентов по нациям разделили ▪️ Операторов БЛА в штурмовики переводить не будут ▪️ В Норвегии начнут сборку дронов для ВСУ ➡️ АЗИАТАРЬ @rybar_pacific Андрей Белоусов и Вячеслав Володин продуктивно съездили в Северную Корею — в планах подписать программу оборонного сотрудничества. Японцы не знают , как реагировать на продолжающийся кризис в Ормузе . Хотя планы по производству своих БЛА в Токио не меняют . ➡️ АМЕРИКАРЬ @rybar_america Монетный двор США оказался масштабной прачечной для нелегального золота, над главой ФБР сгущаются тучи, глава левых демократов прячется от прессы, а Трамп увольняет Национальный научный совет. ➡️ АФРИКАРЬ @rybar_Africa После ухода «Африканского корпуса» из Кидаля наступило затишье, которое продлилось недолго: вскоре боевики ИГ и ДНИМ одновременно активизировались на севере и в центральной части страны. СМИ тем временем уже распространяют слухи о скорой смене власти, нагнетая хаос в информационном поле. ➡️ БАЛКАНАРЬ @balkanar В Боснии нарастает напряжение: центральные власти продолжают усиливать давление на сербов, в то время как хорваты всё громче требуют автономии. Т ем временем власти Черногории строят новый транзитный центр для мигрантов. ➡️ ЕВРОПАРЬ @evropar Британцы забеспокоились из-за недавней « утечки » внутренних данных Пентагона, однако ситуация не помешала им придумать новый способ подзаработать. Ну а история с « Северными потоками » пополнилась новыми подробностями. ➡️ КАВКАЗАРЬ @caucasar В Армении Пашинян заманивает электорат шашлыками и продолжает преследовать оппозицию. Общественники бьют тревогу по поводу судьбы памятника «Мы — наши горы» в Карабахе , зато в Баку оправдывают снос карабахских храмов. Армянские пограничники обучаются в США ➡️ ЛАТИНАРЬ @rybar_latam Конфликт в Колумбии перешел на новый уровень, Аргентина продолжает нагнетать обстановку вокруг Фолклендов, а в Лиме и Боготе опубликовали новые прогнозы по президентским выборам. ➡️ ОРИЕНТАРЬ @rybar_mena Пока иранцы пытаются прекратить войну и устранить ее последствия, Эрдоган снова лезет на воображаемый региональный трон . Израильтяне строят новые союзы и теряют в Ливане людей и технику, а власти Бахрейна лишают иранских агентов гражданства. ➡️ ТУРАНАРЬ @rybar_stan АвтоВАЗу не рады в Казахстане: теперь «Калина» там по стоимости «Кодиака», в Киргизии дошли до нейротворчества , а новый посол отправился в США. ©️ Подписывайтесь на все каналы ©️ #дайджест #итоги ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 Rybar要点 📝 4月27日材料摘要。马里近几日的事件对现任政府和非洲军团的立场来说是悲剧性的：基达尔最终还是被放弃了，关于马里领导层未来的议论再次升温。 ❗️ 更多关于这些及其他主题的详细信息，请阅读我们的摘要。 ➡️ Rybar @rybar — 用简单的话说复杂的事。我们分析中心的主要资源。最重要和最有趣的材料。 ▪️ 特别军事行动纪事，防止另一起恐怖袭击，解放塔拉图蒂诺，奥泽尔诺耶升旗 ▪️ 关于俄罗斯外国人社会支持新规 ▪️ 为什么美国人开始发现东正教 ▪️ 大学如何按民族划分学生 ▪️ 无人机操作员不会被调往突击部队 ▪️ 挪威将开始为乌克兰武装部队组装无人机 ➡️ ASIATAR @rybar_pacific 安德烈·别洛乌索夫和维亚切斯拉夫·沃洛金对朝鲜进行了富有成效的访问——计划签署国防合作计划。日本人不知道如何应对霍尔木兹海峡持续的危机。尽管东京并没有改变其生产本国无人机的计划。 ➡️ AMERICAR @rybar_america 美国铸币局被证明是一个大规模的非法黄金洗钱中心，FBI局长头顶乌云密布，左翼民主党领袖躲避媒体，特朗普解雇了国家科学委员会。 ➡️ AFRICAR @rybar_Africa “非洲军团”撤出基达尔后出现了一段短暂的平静：不久之后，伊斯兰国和支持伊斯兰与穆斯林组织（JNIM）的武装分子同时在马里北部和中部地区活跃起来。与此同时，媒体已经在散布政权即将更迭的谣言，在信息领域制造混乱。 ➡️ BALKANAR @balkanar 波斯尼亚局势日益紧张：中央政府继续加强对塞尔维亚人的压力，而克罗地亚人要求自治的呼声越来越高。与此同时，黑山当局正在建设一个新的移民中转中心。 ➡️ EUROPAR @evropar 英国人对最近五角大楼内部数据的“泄露”感到担忧，但这并没有妨碍他们想出新的赚钱方法。而“北溪”管道事件又增添了新的细节。 ➡️ CAUCASAR @caucasar 在亚美尼亚，帕希尼扬用烤肉串吸引选民，并继续迫害反对派。社会活动人士对卡拉巴赫“我们是我们的山”纪念碑的命运感到担忧，而巴库则为拆除卡拉巴赫的教堂辩护。亚美尼亚边防军正在美国接受培训。 ➡️ LATINAR @rybar_latam 哥伦比亚的冲突升级到了新水平，阿根廷继续在马尔维纳斯群岛问题上加剧紧张局势，利马和波哥大发布了关于总统选举的新预测。 ➡️ ORIENTAR @rybar_mena 当伊朗人试图结束战争并消除其后果时，埃尔多安再次试图登上虚构的地区王座。以色列人正在建立新的联盟，并在黎巴嫩损失人员和装备，巴林当局则剥夺了伊朗代理人的公民身份。 ➡️ TURANAR @rybar_stan 伏尔加汽车厂在哈萨克斯坦不受欢迎：现在那里的“卡利纳”价格堪比“柯迪亚克”，吉尔吉斯斯坦开始使用神经创作，新任大使已前往美国。 ©️ 订阅所有频道 ©️ #摘要 #总结 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX 💸 支持我们

text: OSINTtechnical A Malian official says that “The Russians betrayed us” after Russia’s Africa Corps negotiated a withdrawal with rebel forces in the northern city of Kidal -RFI Russian forces are reportedly preparing to withdraw from additional positions in northern Mali. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 一位马里官员表示，“俄罗斯人背叛了我们”，此前俄罗斯的“非洲军团”与北部城市基达尔的叛军谈判达成了撤军协议 -RFI 据报道，俄罗斯军队正准备从马里北部的更多阵地撤出。 推文

text: WarTranslated The Russians have decided to hold the ceremony after all, but without any military equipment. The event itself will last less than an hour, but that was the plan all along. Everything is going according to plan. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2048848105869590963/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯人最终决定举行仪式，但不展示任何军事装备。活动本身将持续不到一小时，但这本来就是计划的一部分。一切都在按计划进行。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2048848105869590963/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Motorcade carrying King Charles III and Queen Camilla arrives at the White House, as the British Royal Couple is scheduled to have tea this afternoon with President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. https://x.com/BenjAlvarez1/status/2048846242516550121/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 载有查尔斯三世国王和卡米拉王后的车队抵达白宫，英国王室夫妇计划于今天下午与唐纳德·J·特朗普总统和第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普共进下午茶。 https://x.com/BenjAlvarez1/status/2048846242516550121/video/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @suadadalsalhy : Ali al-Zaidi, the Iraqi Coordination Framework’s nominee for prime minister, owns al-Janoub Bank, which has been sanctioned by the US Treasury over allegations of money laundering and dollar smuggling to Iran between 2022 and 2024. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @suadadalsalhy : 伊拉克协调框架提名的总理候选人阿里·扎伊迪拥有南方银行（al-Janoub Bank），该银行因涉嫌在2022年至2024年间洗钱和向伊朗走私美元而受到美国财政部的制裁。 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - U.S. Attorney Pirro: "Make no mistake. This was an attempted assassination of the President of the United States." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048846679940440569/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 美国检察官皮罗：“毫无疑问。这是一次针对美国总统的暗杀企图。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048846679940440569/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Interesting: Polymarket users give Naftali Bennett a slight lead over PM Netanyahu. It’s still way too early to tell in my opinion. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048846377539559822/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 有趣：Polymarket用户认为纳夫塔利·贝内特领先于内塔尼亚胡总理。在我看来，现在下结论还为时过早。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048846377539559822/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Russian soldiers have started shooting down their own drones and demanding rewards for it. To convince their commanders, they even stick Ukrainian symbols and swastikas onto these "trophies". https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2048845279340728406/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯士兵开始击落自己的无人机并以此索要奖励。为了说服指挥官，他们甚至在这些“战利品”上贴上乌克兰标志和纳粹万字旗。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2048845279340728406/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Channel 12 Report: President Trump told PM Netanyahu in a phone call last night that the Lebanon ceasefire must hold. Netanyahu later told the restricted cabinet that President Trump asked Israel to keep showing restraint. I’m not sure how long this lasts. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048845188815024409/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 第12频道报道：特朗普总统昨晚在电话中告诉内塔尼亚胡总理，黎巴嫩停火协议必须维持。内塔尼亚胡随后告诉受限内阁，特朗普总统要求以色列继续保持克制。我不确定这种情况能持续多久。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048845188815024409/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡ 🇲🇱 The FLA showcased Malian equipement recently captured in Kidal. We see here a Bayraktar TB2 control station left intact after the surrender withdrawal of Malian army troops. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇲🇱 FLA展示了最近在基达尔缴获的马里装备。我们在这里看到一个在马里军队投降撤离后完好无损留下的Bayraktar TB2控制站。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Shafaq News: Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has nominated businessman Ali al‑Zaidi as a compromise candidate for prime minister, after caretaker Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani and State of Law leader Nouri al‑Maliki agreed on his name at…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraqi President Nizar Amidi has officially tasked Ali al‑Zaidi, the nominee of the Shiite Coordination Framework, with forming the next government. Iraqi Parliament Speaker Mohammed al‑Halbousi praised the framework’s commitment to constitutional timelines. The President stated that the third stage of the constitutional entitlement has now been completed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 Shafaq News：伊拉克什叶派协调框架已提名商人阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al‑Zaidi）为总理妥协候选人，此前看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani）和法治国家联盟领导人努里·马利基（Nouri al‑Maliki）已就其人选达成一致……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克总统尼扎尔·阿米迪（Nizar Amidi）已正式授权什叶派协调框架提名的阿里·扎伊迪组建下一届政府。伊拉克议会议长穆罕默德·哈尔布西（Mohammed al‑Halbousi）称赞了该框架对宪法时间表的承诺。总统表示，宪法授权的第三阶段现已完成。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Several Israeli airstrikes are targeting southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列多轮空袭正针对黎巴嫩南部。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧🇸🇾 IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir told an IDF senior command conference that Israel is still in a multi‑arena campaign. The military has established forward defence zones in front of communities in Gaza, Syria and Lebanon, and will remain…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir delivered a harsh reprimand to senior commanders over the erosion of discipline, norms and values in the military. He displayed a patch reading “No to hatred, yes to violence” and asked: “Is this the army you want? This is a huge event – a rebellion against IDF values.” Zamir described finding a similar patch on a tank gunner in Bint Jbeil, ordering its removal. He condemned looting in Lebanon as a “moral stain”, demanding battalion commanders submit reports within a week. A special team will monitor inappropriate political posts by soldiers on social media. He also backed a female commander who disciplined soldiers for immodest dress at a promotion ceremony, saying: “Enforce the law and orders. I back you.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧🇸🇾 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔中将在以色列国防军高级指挥会议上表示，以色列仍处于多战线行动中。军方已在加沙、叙利亚和黎巴嫩的社区前方建立了前沿防御区，并将继续……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔中将严厉训斥了高级指挥官，指责军队中纪律、规范和价值观的滑坡。他展示了一个写着“拒绝仇恨，拥抱暴力”的徽章并问道：“这是你们想要的军队吗？这是一起严重的事件——是对以色列国防军价值观的叛乱。”扎米尔描述称在宾特朱拜勒的一名坦克炮手身上发现了类似的徽章，并下令将其移除。他谴责在黎巴嫩的抢劫行为是“道德污点”，要求营级指挥官在一周内提交报告。一个特别小组将监控士兵在社交媒体上发布的不当政治言论。他还支持了一名因士兵在晋升仪式上着装不端而对其进行纪律处分的女性指挥官，称：“执行法律和命令。我支持你。” @wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NEW - The two law firms representing Annie Altman in her sexual abuse lawsuit against her brother, OpenAi's Sam Altman, withdraw from her case, citing "an unfortunate general breakdown in the attorney-client relationship." — Reuters https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048840930463981797/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息——代表安妮·奥特曼（Annie Altman）对其兄弟、OpenAI的萨姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）提起性虐待诉讼的两家律师事务所已退出该案，理由是“律师与客户关系出现了不幸的全面破裂”。——路透社 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048840930463981797/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Israel FM Fires back : Dear Minister, Diplomatic relations, especially between friendly nations, are not conducted on Twitter or in the media. Allegations are not evidence. Evidence substantiating the allegations have yet to be provided. You did not even submit a request for legal assistance before turning to the media and social networks. The matter will be examined. Israel is a state that abides by the rule of law with independent law enforcement authorities. All Israeli authorities will act in accordance with the law. Ukrainian Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: "Friendly Ukrainian-Israeli relations have the potential to benefit both countries, and Russia's illegal trade with stolen Ukrainian grain should not undermine them. It is difficult to understand Israel's lack of appropriate response to Ukraine's legitimate request regarding the previous vessel that delivered stolen goods to Haifa. Now that another such vessel has arrived in Haifa, we once again warn Israel against accepting the stolen grain and harming our relations. In this context, we have already officially summoned the Israeli ambassador to Ukraine tomorrow morning to present our protest note and request appropriate action." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 以色列外交部长回击：尊敬的部长，外交关系，特别是友好国家之间的外交关系，不是在推特或媒体上进行的。指控不是证据。证实这些指控的证据尚未提供。在诉诸媒体和社交网络之前，您甚至没有提交法律援助请求。此事将进行审查。以色列是一个遵守法治、拥有独立执法机构的国家。所有以色列当局都将依法行事。乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比哈：“友好的乌克兰-以色列关系有潜力造福两国，俄罗斯非法交易被盗的乌克兰谷物不应破坏这种关系。很难理解以色列对乌克兰关于此前运送被盗货物至海法的船只的合法请求缺乏适当回应。现在又有一艘此类船只抵达海法，我们再次警告以色列不要接受被盗谷物并损害我们的关系。在此背景下，我们已正式传唤以色列驻乌克兰大使于明早前来，以提交我们的抗议照会并要求采取适当行动。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: "Friendly Ukrainian-Israeli relations have the potential to benefit both countries, and Russia's illegal trade with stolen Ukrainian grain should not undermine them. It is difficult to understand Israel's lack of appropriate response to Ukraine's legitimate request regarding the previous vessel that delivered stolen goods to Haifa. Now that another such vessel has arrived in Haifa, we once again warn Israel against accepting the stolen grain and harming our relations. In this context, we have already officially summoned the Israeli ambassador to Ukraine tomorrow morning to present our protest note and request appropriate action." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比哈：“友好的乌克兰-以色列关系有潜力造福两国，俄罗斯非法交易被盗的乌克兰谷物不应破坏这种关系。很难理解以色列对乌克兰关于此前运送被盗货物至海法的船只的合法请求缺乏适当回应。现在又有一艘此类船只抵达海法，我们再次警告以色列不要接受被盗谷物并损害我们的关系。在此背景下，我们已正式传唤以色列驻乌克兰大使于明早前来，以提交我们的抗议照会并要求采取适当行动。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel King Charles and Queen Camilla at Joint Base Andrews ahead of a meeting with President Trump. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048839962489987102/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 查尔斯国王和卡米拉王后在与特朗普总统会晤前抵达安德鲁斯联合基地。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048839962489987102/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A wave of Israeli attacks in southern Lebanon tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列在黎巴嫩南部发动的一波袭击 推文

text_zh: Open Source Intel 查尔斯国王和卡米拉王后在马里兰州的安德鲁斯联合基地下机。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048838649714753793/photo/1 查尔斯国王已降落在华盛顿特区南部的安德鲁斯联合基地 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048835561763307939/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel British maritime security firm Ambrey reports that Houthi senior leadership are now discussing mechanisms for potentially imposing transit tolls/fees on ships passing through the Bab al-Mandab Strait. 10-12% of the world’s seaborne trade runs through this strait. 🚨 ARE IRAN AND ITS PROXIES GIVING MORE REASONS TO STRIKE? Iran is already charging transit fees in the Strait of Hormuz, asserting control over a chokepoint that carries a massive share of the world’s energy supply Now reports suggest the Houthis are exploring similar tolls in Bab al-Mandab, another critical global shipping route. - Mossad Commentary tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国海事安全公司 Ambrey 报告称，胡塞武装高层目前正在讨论对通过曼德海峡的船只征收过境通行费/费用的机制。全球 10-12% 的海运贸易经过该海峡。🚨 伊朗及其代理人是否在提供更多打击理由？伊朗已经在霍尔木兹海峡收取过境费，确立了对承载全球大量能源供应的咽喉要道的控制。现在有报道称，胡塞武装正在探索在另一个关键的全球航运路线——曼德海峡征收类似的通行费。 - Mossad Commentary 推文

text: Open Source Intel UK PM Keir Starmer: "We are doing everything we can to get the Strait of Hormuz open. That is vital in terms of minimizing the impact." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048837982740726114/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国首相基尔·斯塔默：“我们正在尽一切努力开放霍尔木兹海峡。这对于最大限度地减少影响至关重要。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048837982740726114/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel South Africa pulled its draft national AI policy after its references turned out to include fake, AI-generated sources. - Reuters tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 南非撤回了其国家人工智能政策草案，因为其中的参考文献被发现包含虚假的、人工智能生成的来源。 - 路透社 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian hacker group Handala claims it torched a vehicle belonging to a senior Shin Bet agent inside Israel. The group says it has carried out dozens of operations on Israeli territory. Little evidence supports the claim that the vehicle belonged to the agent in question. @JoeTruzman tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗黑客组织 Handala 声称在以色列境内烧毁了一名辛贝特（Shin Bet）高级特工的车辆。该组织称已在以色列领土上进行了数十次行动。几乎没有证据支持该车辆属于该特工的说法。 @JoeTruzman 推文

text: Open Source Intel UN Secretary-General António Guterres: "Navigational rights & freedoms through the Strait of Hormuz must be respected. I appeal to the parties: Open the Strait. Let ships pass. No tolls. No discrimination. Let trade resume. Let the global economy breathe. Safe, unimpeded passage is an economic & humanitarian imperative." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 联合国秘书长安东尼奥·古特雷斯：“必须尊重通过霍尔木兹海峡的航行权利和自由。我呼吁各方：开放海峡。让船只通过。不收通行费。不歧视。让贸易恢复。让全球经济喘口气。安全、畅通的通行是经济和人道主义的必然要求。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel WILD FOOTAGE 🔴 Turkish children were caught on video as teachers brought students onto the stage during a school ceremony, where they tore American and Israeli flags and ripped photos of President Trump. All the children in attendance clap. Turkey is a NATO ally. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048834246697972033/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 疯狂画面 🔴 土耳其儿童在学校仪式上被老师带上舞台，视频显示他们撕毁美国和以色列国旗，并撕碎特朗普总统的照片。所有在场的儿童都鼓掌。土耳其是北约盟国。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048834246697972033/video/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇩 Washington Tightens Grip on Congolese Wealth Under Guise of "Security" . In a blatant move to secure Western corporate interests at the expense of local sovereignty, the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has announced the creation of a $100 million paramilitary "mining guard." While framed by the government as an effort to "clean up" the sector, the initiative is transparently backed by the United States and the United Arab Emirates—two powers desperate to lock down the DRC’s vast mineral reserves. @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇩 华盛顿以“安全”为幌子加强对刚果财富的控制。在以牺牲当地主权为代价确保西方企业利益的公然举动中，刚果民主共和国（DRC）宣布成立一支价值 1 亿美元的准军事“矿业卫队”。虽然政府将其描述为“清理”该行业的努力，但该倡议显然得到了美国和阿拉伯联合酋长国的支持——这两个大国急于锁定刚果民主共和国庞大的矿产储备。 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarTranslated The Russians destroyed a 6-ton sunflower oil tank with a strike on the "Chornomorsk" port in the Odesa region. An oil slick measuring 400 by 200 meters has formed on the water's surface. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2048834088736260401/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯人袭击了敖德萨地区的“切尔诺莫斯克”港口，摧毁了一个 6 吨重的葵花籽油罐。水面上形成了一片 400 米乘 200 米的油膜。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2048834088736260401/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Stars of Minab 🕊: 🔖 Sleeping at the gravesides. The psychological toll of losing a child defies measurement. This video documents the unimaginable reality of Minab's grieving parents. Unable to cope with empty bedrooms, families are spending their nights at the freshly dug graves of their martyred children, seeking closeness in the darkness. 👁‍🗨 Witness their enduring pain!
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Stars of Minab 🕊: 🔖 睡在墓地旁。失去孩子的心理创伤无法衡量。这段视频记录了米纳布（Minab）悲痛欲绝的父母们难以想象的现实。由于无法面对空荡荡的卧室，这些家庭在他们殉难子女的新坟旁度过夜晚，在黑暗中寻求亲近。 👁‍🗨 见证他们持久的痛苦！

text: 📝 Хроника специальной военной операции 📝 за 27 апреля 2026 года 🧨 Российские войска в очередной раз нанесли удар по портовой инфраструктуре Одессы , поражен сухогруз. В Черниговской области около двух десятков прилетов пришлось на различные объекты в Корюковке , а в Ромнах атакована подстанция . Активность оперативно-тактической авиации и «геранистов» остается ниже среднего из-за погодных условий. Украинские формирования массированных налетов по территории России не проводили по причине надвинувшегося циклона и пылевых бурь. За сутки зафиксировано несколько атак БЛА в Белгородской области , а также в освобожденных частях Запорожской и Херсонской областей . ➡️ На Слобожанском направлении штурмовики 34 мотострелковой бригады после более чем недели боёв освободили Таратутино , закрепились на его территории, а также заняли окрестные лесные массивы. ➡️ На Славянском направлении подразделения 25 армии освободили Озерное (Ильичовку) , подняв над ним государственные флаги. На противоположном берегу реки продолжаются бои на территории Кривой Луки . ➡️ На Добропольском направлении бойцы ГВ «Центр» продавливают оборону противника на подступах к Новому Донбассу . Штурмовикам удалось зачистить еще несколько лесополос к юго-востоку от села и расширить вклинение в порядки противника. 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Обстановка в зоне специальной военной операции ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Слобожанское направление ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Славянское направление ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Добропольское направление ( ru ; en ) 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Одесса #Россия #Славянск #Украина #Чернигов ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 2026年4月27日特别军事行动纪事 📝 🧨 俄罗斯军队再次打击了敖德萨的港口基础设施，一艘干货船被击中。在切尔尼戈夫州，科留科夫卡的多个设施遭到约二十次袭击，罗姆内的一座变电站也遭到攻击。由于天气原因，战术航空兵和“天竺葵”无人机的活动保持在平均水平以下。乌克兰武装部队因气旋和沙尘暴的逼近，未对俄罗斯领土进行大规模袭击。全天在别尔哥罗德州以及扎波罗热州和赫尔松州的解放区记录到数次无人机袭击。 ➡️ 在斯洛博然斯克方向，第34摩托化步兵旅的突击部队在经过一周多的战斗后解放了塔拉图蒂诺（Taratutino），巩固了阵地，并占领了周边的森林地带。 ➡️ 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，第25集团军的部队解放了奥泽尔诺耶（伊利乔夫卡），并在其上空升起了国旗。在河对岸，克里瓦亚卢卡（Krivaya Luka）地区的战斗仍在继续。 ➡️ 在多布罗波利耶方向，“中央”部队群的战士正在突破敌人在新顿巴斯（Novy Donbass）外围的防御。突击部队成功清理了村庄东南部的另外几片林带，并扩大了对敌方阵地的楔入。 📎 高清地图： 🔸 特别军事行动区局势 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 斯洛博然斯克方向 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 斯拉维扬斯克方向 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 多布罗波利耶方向 ( ru ; en ) 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #敖德萨 #俄罗斯 #斯拉维扬斯克 #乌克兰 #切尔尼戈夫 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework official nominne is businessman Ali al‑Zaidi who holds a master’s in finance and banking, is director of Al‑Janoob Islamic Bank (under US sanctions since 2024 for alleged money laundering and illegal dollar use), CEO…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Shafaq News : Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has nominated businessman Ali al‑Zaidi as a compromise candidate for prime minister, after caretaker Prime Minister Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani and State of Law leader Nouri al‑Maliki agreed on his name at a meeting hosted by Popular Mobilisation Forces chairman Falih al‑Fayyadh. He also has ties to Muqtada al‑Sadr’s office. Political sources said Zaidi may face challenges in forming a government and securing parliamentary approval. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架的官方提名人是商人阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al‑Zaidi），他拥有金融与银行学硕士学位，是南方伊斯兰银行（Al‑Janoob Islamic Bank，因涉嫌洗钱和非法使用美元自2024年起受美国制裁）的董事，也是……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Shafaq News：伊拉克什叶派协调框架已提名商人阿里·扎伊迪为总理妥协候选人，此前看守总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼（Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani）和法治国家联盟领导人努里·马利基（Nouri al‑Maliki）在人民动员力量（PMF）主席法利赫·法耶德（Falih al‑Fayyadh）主持的会议上就其人选达成一致。他与穆克塔达·萨德尔（Muqtada al‑Sadr）的办公室也有联系。政治消息人士称，扎伊迪在组建政府和获得议会批准方面可能面临挑战。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Coordination Framework has officially nominated Ali al‑Zaidi as its candidate for prime minister. Iraqi Parliament Speaker Mohammed al‑Halbousi has arrived at Baghdad Palace, and First Deputy Speaker Adnan Faihan has also arrived, as the framework…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework official nominne is businessman Ali al‑Zaidi who holds a master’s in finance and banking, is director of Al‑Janoob Islamic Bank (under US sanctions since 2024 for alleged money laundering and illegal dollar use), CEO of Dijlah TV, chairman of Al‑Shaab University, and owns Taawon Hypermarket. The nomination was agreed by outgoing Prime Minister Sudani and Nouri al‑Maliki at a meeting hosted by PMF chairman Falih al‑Fayyadh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克协调框架已正式提名阿里·扎伊迪为其总理候选人。伊拉克议会议长穆罕默德·哈尔布西（Mohammed al‑Halbousi）已抵达巴格达宫，第一副议长阿德南·法伊汉（Adnan Faihan）也已抵达，因为该框架……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架的官方提名人是商人阿里·扎伊迪，他拥有金融与银行学硕士学位，是南方伊斯兰银行（因涉嫌洗钱和非法使用美元自2024年起受美国制裁）的董事、迪杰拉电视台（Dijlah TV）首席执行官、阿尔沙布大学（Al‑Shaab University）董事长，并拥有Taawon大卖场。该提名由即将离任的总理苏达尼和努里·马利基在人民动员力量主席法利赫·法耶德主持的会议上达成一致。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Mediterranean Man: ⚡️ 🇲🇱 In Gao, Mali, most of the city has fell into the hands of the FLA and Al-Qaeda, Russian elements have, for once, decided not to retreat and instead stay barricaded inside the city limits with their Malian allies. Gunfights have been rare to break out this day as trying to remove the Malians and the Russians from their positions will heavily cost FLA/JNIM alot of soldiers, but it is unlikely for the Malians and the Russians to survive a prolonged siege if it was fought to the end, as reinforcements are simply non-existent. @medmannews
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Mediterranean Man：⚡️ 🇲🇱 在马里加奥，该市大部分地区已落入FLA和基地组织手中，俄罗斯人员破天荒地决定不撤退，而是与他们的马里盟友一起在城市范围内筑垒固守。今天几乎没有发生枪战，因为试图将马里人和俄罗斯人从阵地中清除将使FLA/JNIM付出大量士兵的代价，但如果战斗到底，马里人和俄罗斯人不太可能在长期的围困中幸存，因为根本没有增援部队。@medmannews

text: King Charles has arrived in the U.S., where he will meet with Trump.
text_zh: 查尔斯国王已抵达美国，他将在那里会见特朗普。

text: ❗️ Israeli attacks targeted the following Lebanese towns and cities: Nabatieh, Byout Al-Seyyed, Harees, Touleen, Qana, Sidqeen, Kfour, Baraacheet etc At least one resulted in a martyr and other injuries. Another attack targeted near Qaaqeyeh bridge.
text_zh: ❗️ 以色列袭击了以下黎巴嫩城镇和城市：纳巴泰（Nabatieh）、Byout Al-Seyyed、哈里斯（Harees）、图林（Touleen）、加纳（Qana）、Sidqeen、Kfour、Baraacheet等。至少造成一名烈士和其他人受伤。另一次袭击针对Qaaqeyeh桥附近。

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Starmer says if the Iran conflict goes on longer then, "people might change their habits, where they go on holiday this year, what they're buying in the supermarket, that sort of thing." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048832047330865374/video/1 tweet

text_zh: Open Source Intel 白宫：特朗普总统正在就伊朗的提议进行磋商。你很快就会听到他的回应。推文

text: U.S. Central Command A U.S. Marine Corps F-35B Lightning II launches from amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7) while sailing in the Arabian Sea, April 24. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2048828247018770522/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国海军陆战队F-35B闪电II战斗机于4月24日在阿拉伯海航行时，从两栖攻击舰的黎波里号（LHA 7）上起飞。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2048828247018770522/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: 🔴 WHCA shooting suspect Cole Tomas Allen has been charged with attempting to assassinate U.S. President Donald Trump, BNO News reports. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048828041820832092/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 突发：🔴 据BNO新闻报道，白宫记者协会（WHCA）枪击案嫌疑人科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Tomas Allen）已被指控企图暗杀美国总统唐纳德·特朗普。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048828041820832092/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt: "People LISTEN and when you have mentally disturbed individuals who are listening to this crazed rhetoric about the President, it inspires them." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827923403059271/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 白宫新闻秘书卡琳·让-皮埃尔（Karoline Leavitt）： “人们在倾听，当你有一些精神失常的人在听这些关于总统的疯狂言论时，这会激励他们。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827923403059271/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Gov. Jeff Landry: "This is why the president should get his ballroom. You could have the White House Correspondents dinner there and not have to worry about these things. I think the president is just a stand-up of a fella. He's the most American president we've had in so long." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827870936444949/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 杰夫·兰德里（Jeff Landry）州长：“这就是为什么总统应该拥有他的宴会厅。你可以在那里举行白宫记者晚宴，而不必担心这些事情。我认为总统只是一个站得住脚的人。他是我们这么久以来拥有的最美国化的总统。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048827870936444949/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The White House Correspondents Dinner shooting suspect, Cole Thomas Allen, has been charged with three felony counts. These include attempting to assassinate the president. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048827617525051491/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 白宫记者晚宴枪击案嫌疑人科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Thomas Allen）已被控三项重罪。其中包括企图暗杀总统。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048827617525051491/photo/1 推文
